data.body: Change 658: LLM-Review +1 (code approved). First Verified was -1 due to pre-existing flaky tests (test_worker_hard_crash_maps_to_parse_error_not_host_crash, test_run_acli_429_retries_with_rate_limit_backoff) — same flakes failing on main that other sessions are debugging; both pass locally serially in ~1s, confirming timing/xdist flakiness not a regression (change is YAML-only, cannot affect these Python tests). Posted 'recheck' to re-run CI on the same patchset. Will submit once Verified flips +1 (rebasing to main tip first if FFO requires).
